upanetṛ a. One who leads or brings near, fetching;  Ku. 1. 60 ; mālatyabhijñānasyopanetrī  Māl. 9. 
— m. (tā) A preceptor who performs the upanayana ceremony, an Ācārya;  Pt. 4. 66.
